message:
fix(layout): remove h-full class and extend scroll metrics usage

## app/layout.tsx
- Remove h-full class from <html> element
- This was causing layout overflow issues on mobile Safari where
  document height was constrained, breaking scroll progress tracking

## article-progress.tsx
- Import and use getScrollMetrics() for consistent scroll position
- Replace direct window.scrollY access with getScrollMetrics().scrollTop
- Apply to both metrics calculation (getBoundingClientRect offset) and
  progress calculation (scroll position within article)

This completes the cross-browser scroll fix by ensuring the progress
indicator uses the same scroll detection logic as article reveal animations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
